user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Scheduled run before user's first Monday meeting; or on-dema for account Parnell Aerospace. Generating output.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Parnell Aerospace: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

required_artifacts: Top 5-10 accounts ranked by urgency x impact

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF01-B trap (Lists 30+ accounts without prioritization (defeats the purpose of triage)); produces complete Top 5-10 accounts ranked by urgency x impact, reason per account, named next action with owner, time
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF01-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF01-B failure mode (Lists 30+ accounts without prioritization (defeats the purpose of triage))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF01-B -- Lists 30+ accounts without prioritization (defeats the purpose of triage)
